text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 69 

GAP_DAYS_MONPP_3M 

LABEL: Gap Mail Order Non-Preferred Pharmacy — days in 3-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a 3-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using mail 
order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP; also known as a standard mail order pharmacy within a split 
network) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT
